summary: Comprehensive testing of Expanded Universal Scenario Data Hub with 19 sources, 99 scenarios, 875 trajectories across 6 tiers. All 24 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI features working correctly including stat cards, source filter badges with tier indicators (T1-T6), REAL DATA badges on IIASA-sourced scenarios, Analytics tab with temperature distribution/tier pie/category charts, Data Sources tab grouped by tier, and scenario detail view with Data Quality indicator (Real Data vs Synthetic) and TrajectoryViewer.
critical_code_review_comments: 16 of 19 sources use SYNTHETIC data (IEA, IRENA, REMIND, GCAM, MESSAGEix, IMAGE, WITCH, TIAM, EU_Ref, UK_CCC, US_EIA, China, Japan, IEA_Sectors, Carbon_Price, Physical_Risk)
3 sources use REAL IIASA data via pyam library: NGFS (Phase V), IPCC (AR6-public), IAMC15 (1.5C scenarios)
seed_data_creation: Data already synced: 19 sources across 6 tiers with 99 scenarios and 875 trajectories. NGFS (27 scenarios, 399 traj), IPCC (30 scenarios, 79 traj), IAMC15 (10 scenarios, 59 traj), IEA (3 scenarios), IRENA (2 scenarios), plus 14 other synthetic sources
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expanded Data Hub with 19 sources fully tested. Real IIASA data sources: NGFS (ngfs_phase_5), IPCC (ar6-public), IAMC15 (iamc15). Analytics endpoints working: /analytics/coverage, /analytics/temperature-range, /trajectories/available-variables. Scenario detail view correctly distinguishes Real Data vs Synthetic via external_id containing '|' pattern. TrajectoryViewer shows line charts with variable/region dropdowns.
passed_tests: Backend API Tests (24/24 passed):
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/stats returns 19 sources, 99 scenarios, ~875 trajectories
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/sources returns 19 sources across tiers 1-6
- Tier 1 has 5 sources: NGFS, IPCC, IAMC15, IEA, IRENA
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/scenarios?source_id=<ngfs_id> filters to 27 NGFS scenarios
- NGFS scenarios have real data external_ids (model|scenario format)
- Scenarios have display_name and carbon_neutral_year fields
- POST /api/v1/data-hub/scenarios/search returns matching results
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/scenarios/<id>/trajectories returns variable_code, sector, data_quality_score
- Real data trajectories have data_quality_score >= 4
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/analytics/coverage returns by_tier, by_category, variables (45+), regions (13)
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/analytics/temperature-range returns buckets (<1.5C to >4.0C)
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/trajectories/available-variables returns 62 unique variables
Frontend UI Tests (all passed):
- Data Hub page loads with 19 sources, 99 scenarios, 875 trajectories, 62 variables, 13 regions
- Source filter badges show tier indicators (T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6)
- NGFS filter correctly shows 27 scenarios
- REAL DATA badge displayed on IAMC/IPCC/NGFS scenarios with pipe-separated external_id
- Analytics tab shows Temperature Distribution bar chart, Scenarios by Tier pie chart, Category breakdown
- Data Sources tab groups sources by tier with scenario/trajectory counts
- Scenario detail view shows Data Quality indicator (Real Data vs Synthetic)
- TrajectoryViewer renders line chart with variable/region dropdowns
- Real data scenario shows correct trajectory chart with extended time horizon (2005-2100)
- Back button returns to browse view

mocked_apis_list: 16 of 19 sources use SYNTHETIC data generators
IEA, IRENA, REMIND, GCAM, MESSAGEix, IMAGE, WITCH, TIAM fetchers generate synthetic trajectories
EU Reference, UK CCC, US EIA, China NDRC, Japan METI fetchers generate synthetic regional data
IEA Sectors, Carbon Price, Physical Risk fetchers generate synthetic sector/pricing/climate data
3 sources (NGFS, IPCC, IAMC15) fetch REAL data from IIASA Scenario Explorer via pyam library
